category_sources: source_facts.description says it wraps make to colorize output; official README describes a wrapper that makes make output more colorful and errors easier to find.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is colormake; official GitHub repository heading and README use Colormake.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation and includes files, installation, usage, and contribution notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pagekite/Colormake; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe make wrapping, colorized output, shell/Perl scripts, and CLI commands.
